last_alert.reasoning: Allocating remaining €50 to QQQ captures tech/growth upside appropriate for a 20-year-old with long time horizon. This 50/50 split between broad market (SPY) and tech (QQQ) balances risk while maintaining growth exposure.

all_actions.headline: Market stability opportunity for broad index exposure
all_actions.reasoning: With €100 available cash and no current holdings, deploying 50% into SPY provides diversified market exposure and establishes a core position. This balanced approach preserves dry powder for tactical opportunities.
